import json, re, unicodedata

# Load the provided databases
with open('/mnt/data/file-RhatJL6W5hpishQfBLfQ2a-quranic_verses.json', 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
    quran = json.load(f)

with open('/mnt/data/file-GKgoPWB6fR896BnuZfjrBZ-six_hadith_books.json', 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
    hadith = json.load(f)

# Normalization helpers
def normalize_ar(text):
    # Remove tashkeel
    tashkeel = re.compile(r'[\u0617-\u061A\u064B-\u0652\u0670\u0656-\u065F\u06D6-\u06ED]')
    text = tashkeel.sub('', text)
    # Remove tatweel and punctuation
    text = re.sub(r'[\u0640`~!@#\$%\^&\*\(\)\-_=+\[\]\{\}\\\|;:\'",<>\./\?\u060C\u061B\u061F،؛؟…«»]', ' ', text)
    # Normalize alef/hamza/ya/ta marbuta
    text = re.sub('[إأٱآا]', 'ا', text)
    text = text.replace('ى', 'ي').replace('ؤ','و').replace('ئ','ي').replace('ة','ه')
    # Collapse spaces
    text = re.sub(r'\s+', ' ', text).strip()
    return text

target_snippet = "الدُّنْيَا نُؤْتِهِ مِنْهَا وَمَنْ يُرِدْ ثَوَابَ الْآخِرَةِ نُؤْتِهِ مِنْهَا"

norm_target = normalize_ar(target_snippet)

# Search in Quran
matches = []
for rec in quran:
    ayah = rec.get('ayah_text','')
    if not ayah: 
        continue
    if norm_target in normalize_ar(ayah):
        matches.append(ayah)

len(matches), matches[:3]
